title: Reversa Pricing Profile
description: Billing profile generated by the reversa-pricing-profile agent, consumed by the reversa-pricing-size and reversa-pricing-estimate agents.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the profile creation or last regeneration.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the operating country.

hourly_rate.description: Net hourly rate in local currency.

hourly_rate_mode.description: direto = user provided the value directly; derivado = calculated from monthly_target_income and billable_hours_per_month.

monthly_target_income.description: Desired net monthly income in local currency. Required when hourly_rate_mode = derivado, null otherwise.

billable_hours_per_month.description: Estimated billable hours per month. Required when hourly_rate_mode = derivado, null otherwise.

margin_percent.description: Project markup over direct cost, as a percentage. The historical field name margin_percent is kept for compatibility.

tax_regime.description: Canonical key of the tax regime documented in references/tax-regimes.md, or 'outro'.

tax_factor.description: Approximate tax factor associated with the regime. Applied by the Pricer over direct cost.

tax_factor_kind.description: Factor type: approximate effective reserve, simplified statutory proxy, or tax not computed.

tax_factor_source.description: Public source or internal catalog entry that justifies the approximate factor.

includes_vat.description: Indicates whether the factor combines income tax/contribution with VAT/IVA/ISS itemized on the invoice.

vat_pass_through_warning.description: Indicates whether the estimate should warn that part of the tax may be passed through to the client and does not necessarily reduce margin.

tax_regime_confidence.description: high = user chose explicitly; low = fallback suggestion or 'outro'.

client_profile.description: May be empty when the user chooses to skip this question.

billing_currency.description: Currency in which the user bills the client when different from currency. null when billing in local currency.

exchange_rate_to_local.description: Manual exchange rate: how many units of currency equal 1 unit of billing_currency. null when not billing in foreign currency.
